name: Low activity and low ownership RM
description: Poor lead logging, weak branch visits, low follow-up, vague reasons for non-performance.
behavior: Shows low visible ownership through weak activity discipline and inconsistent follow-up.
cm_treatment: Use SBI + clear tasking. State observed behaviour, impact on business, and give specific    daily/weekly actions with tracking.
impact: Pipeline gets weak. Branch may stop taking the RM seriously because visible ownership is low.
